name: Matrix Synapse
short_description: Open-source Matrix homeserver for chat and real-time communication.
description: Matrix Synapse is the reference Matrix homeserver implementation for secure, decentralized chat and federated real-time communication. It supports end-to-end encryption, room history, and federation with other Matrix servers while giving complete control over messaging data.
usecases: Host your own chat and rooms.
notes: Set SYNAPSE_SERVER_NAME and TLS correctly before production use.
